_comment: Structural assertions, not byte-exact expected values. The harness checks invariants; prompt/model drift won't break it.

time_window_selector_vendor._comment: With vendor_anomalies fed in, the same fixture should produce (a) a top window that still contains 08:30, (b) at least one vendor anomaly surfaced in its supporting_evidence, and (c) a strictly-not-lower confidence than the no-vendor baseline. That last check is what proves Watchdog is first-class, not cosmetic.

bm25_rerank.query_used: checkout failing last-unit reserves inventory 500 boundary

anomaly_ensemble._comment: Run only as a smoke check — we don't assert specific anomalies because the detector is probabilistic

cross_agent_validator._comment: Given a contrived contradiction (fix touches services not in signals), validator must flag a warning
